description: Understand the essential safety practices in the kitchen.

steps.instruction: Always wash your hands before cooking.
steps.tip: Use soap and water for at least 20 seconds.

steps.instruction: Keep knives and sharp tools out of reach of children.
steps.tip: Store them in a safe place when not in use.

steps.instruction: Be aware of your surroundings while cooking.
steps.tip: Avoid distractions and keep flammable materials away from heat sources.
